description: The star everything in this bundle orbits.
text:
# Aurinko

The sun sits at the center. The [Planeetat](planeetat.md) circle it, and
even the [[kuu]] answers to its light. A [Komeetta](komeetta.md) visits
when it pleases.
title: Aurinko

text:
# Kotiaurinko

A tiny knowledge bundle about a home star system. This preamble is
hand-written and must survive compilation untouched.

## Concepts

* [Aurinko](aurinko.md) - the star everything orbits
* [Planeetat](planeetat.md) - the catalogue of worlds
* [Maa](maa.md) - the blue one
* [Kuu](kuu.md) - the companion
* [Komeetta](komeetta.md) - the visitor
* [Yksinäinen](yksinainen.md) - the unlinked wanderer
* [Atolli](saaret/atolli.md) - a ring in the sea
* [Laguuni](saaret/laguuni.md) - the water inside the ring

description: A visitor with a tail, seen only every few decades — pöllämystynyt matkalainen.
text:
# Komeetta

It falls toward [Aurinko](aurinko.md), swings around, and races away. Years
later it returns to the same [Aurinko](aurinko.md), as visitors do.
title: Komeetta

text:
# Kuu

The moon pulls the tides of [Maa](maa.md).

```markdown
Links inside code fences are not links: [ei](ei-ole.md)
```
title: Kuu

description: The blue world with a companion and a home.
text:
# Maa

The earth keeps one companion, [Kuu](/kuu.md), and belongs to the
[Planeetat](planeetat.md).
title: Maa

description: The catalogue of worlds around the star.
text:
# Planeetat

Every world orbits [Aurinko](aurinko.md). The one we care most about is
[Maa](maa.md).
title: Planeetat

description: A ring of coral in the island sea.
text:
# Atolli

The ring encloses the [Laguuni](laguuni.md) and speaks to nothing else.
title: Atolli

description: The calm water inside the ring.
text:
# Laguuni

Held by the [Atolli](atolli.md). Old maps also name an
[Olematon](olematon.md) shoal, but no page exists for it.
title: Laguuni

description: A wanderer no other concept links to.
text:
# Yksinäinen

Nothing points here. It still looks at [[aurinko|Aurinko itse]] from afar,
which keeps it on the mainland of the graph.
title: Yksinäinen
